meta.description: Validate branch protection settings require pull requests via GitHub API or GitLab API

assessment.message: Direct pushes are disabled in default branch. PR required.

error.message: Direct pushes are enabled so PRs are not required.
error.guidance: Create a branch ruleset protecting your default branch and enable "Restrict updates"

meta.description: Validate minimum approval count and prevent self-approval via GitHub API or GitLab API

assessment.message: Minimum one non-author approval is required

error.message: PRs can be merged without peer review.
error.guidance: Ensure the pull request rule requires at least one approving review.

assessment.message: New, reviewable commits pushed will dismiss previous PR review approvals.

error.message: Approvals are not dismissed when new commits are pushed.
error.guidance: Create a branch ruleset protecting your default branch and enable "Dismiss stale pull request approvals when new commits are pushed"

assessment.message: The most recent push must be approved by someone other than the person who pushed it.

error.message: The most recent reviewable push is not approved by someone other than the person who pushed it.
error.guidance: Create a branch ruleset protecting your default branch and enable "Require approval of the most recent reviewable push"

meta.description: Validate force push blocking is enabled on protected branches via GitHub API or GitLab API

assessment.message: Force pushing is disabled in default branch.

error.message: Force pushes can be sent to main branch
error.guidance: Create a branch ruleset protecting your default branch and enable "Block force pushes"

meta.description: Validate admin bypass prevention is enabled via GitHub API or GitLab API

assessment.message: Force pushing is disabled in default branch.

error.message: Force pushes can be sent to main branch
error.guidance: Create a branch ruleset protecting your default branch and enable "Block force pushes"

meta.description: Validate code owner review requirements are enabled when CODEOWNERS file exists via GitHub API or GitLab API

tenets.code: has(predicates[0].data.values) ? predicates[0].data.values.exists(rule, rule.type == "pull_request" && rule.parameters.require_code_owner_review == true) : false

assessment.message: CODEOWNER approval is required before merging

error.message: CODEOWNER approval is not required before merging
error.guidance: Create a branch ruleset protecting your default branch and enable "Require review from Code Owners"
